title: Software Update - DFU -  Locking mobile device during update
scenario: Firmware update (DFU) continues running or completes successfully when mobile device is locked during the update process
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home screen.
2. Connect to the Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Start the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process.
5. While the update is in progress, press the Power button on the mobile device to lock the screen.
6. Wait for a reasonable duration (e.g., 1–2 minutes).
7. Unlock the mobile device and return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Observe the firmware update status on the screen.
expected: The firmware update is still running or has successfully completed. The app should show the update progress or a completion confirmation.
